title: StudioDash
seoTitle: StudioDash | Developer Analytics Dashboard | BarkinMad Studios
description: StudioDash brings App Store Connect, Cloudflare, advertising, search, and operational metrics into one workspace for independent developers and small studios.
keywords: developer dashboard, app analytics, app store analytics, cloudflare analytics, indie developer tools, studio dashboard, business intelligence
heading: StudioDash

hero.alt: StudioDash developer analytics dashboard with revenue, download, traffic and operational metrics

overview: StudioDash is an analytics and business intelligence platform for independent developers, creators, and small studios.

It brings App Store Connect, Cloudflare, AdMob, AdSense, Search Console, GitHub, and other services into one workspace, making it easier to monitor downloads, revenue, traffic, performance, and operational health from a single dashboard.
The product is in active development, with a private beta planned before wider release.

sections.heading: Why It Was Built
paragraphs: Developers often need to move between multiple services to understand how their products and business are performing. That makes it harder to spot trends, compare performance, and catch issues quickly.
StudioDash brings analytics, revenue reporting, service health, and operational metrics together in a native workspace designed for independent developers.

sections.heading: Development Status
paragraphs: StudioDash is actively developed by BarkinMad Studios.
A controlled private beta is planned for a limited number of independent developers and small studios, giving early users the chance to help shape the product before public release.

actions.label: Learn about the StudioDash Private Beta
